From: Oonagh Duncan oonagh@fitfeelgsood.com
Subject: the truth about belly fat after 40
Date: October 25, 2018 at 8:04 AM
To:
Hey (name)!
First thing: If you watched the webinar - you'll know that
my program that delivers guaranteed results for women
in their 40s is open for registration!
Second thing: Remember that part of Good Will Hunting
where Robin Williams kept saying to Matt Damon "It’s not
your fault" and at first he was like, ‘yeah I know’ but
eventually he was all blubbering?
I think a lot of us are like that about our bellies. We KNOW
it’s not our fault that we
- love a good snack
- can’t find time to exercise
- cave to a glass of wine at the end of the day
…but deep down inside there’s often that nagging voice that
says:
‘there you go again. You blew it. "
Let me get all Robin Williams on you right now:
It’s NOT your fault.
If you are reading this and you are between the ages of 35-
55, there is a shitstorm of hormonal, muscular and
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 18 --

environmental factors that want you to pack on belly fat.
This is totally not your fault.
However, to quote one of my favourite writers, Jen Sincero:
It's not your fault if you ARE fucked up
It's your fault if you STAY fucked up
And by 'fucked up' I mean:
- Unhappy with the shape and health of your body
- Wishing you had the energy that you used to have
- Feeling resigned that "this is just what happens when you
get older/have kids/get too busy."
You don't have to live that way.
You could choose to reverse some of the effects of aging
starting NOW.
You could tell the 'middle age spread' that you will politely
decline the invitation to that party.
Or...
You could do nothing. And continue to get the same results
you are getting now (and if you like those results, then
great!)
It's up to you.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 18 --

But your opportunity to let me give you the blueprint
that guarantees a reversal of this aging process is
going soon.
CLICK HERE to secure your spot in the 28 Day
Transformation Challenge and reclaim your vitality.
It's yours for the taking.
Oonagh
PS.
"Who does this girl think she is, telling me that I can reverse
the effects of aging?"
Good point.
Don't believe me. Check out the 5 star reviews on Google

Oonagh Duncan

From: Oonagh Duncan oonagh@fitfeelgsood.com
Subject: Last chance! (and a sneak peek)
Date: October 26, 2018 at 8:09 AM
To:
Hey there (name)!
It's getting down to the wire to book your spot in the
upcoming 28 Day Transformation Challenge.
So: Let's get real.
You and I both know that the weight loss industry is full of
big promises and maximum ridiculousness.
(Like this commercial for a tin foil suit that just MELTS
AWAY THE POUNDS! ha!)
:)
....So it's totally understandable that I get a lot of scepticism
when I go around guaranteeing that you'll be leaner and
healthier in 28 days.
Especially after the age of 40.
I mean - you've heard that before, right?
So I wanted to peel back the curtain so you can see why I'm
so ballsy about that results guarantee.
Here's exactly what happens during the 28 Day
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 18 --

Transformation Challenge and why it works so well:
TODAY:
This is when you get access to the membership site:
There, you'll find:
Your two cookbooks - omnivore and vegetarian-
FULL of seasonal, clean, and holy crap delicious
recipes that are optimized to boost the metabolism
of someone past 40 years old.
Directions on how to complete your 'before' fitness
assessment and measurements so we can see
exactly how much muscle sarcopenia we are dealing
with.
Your first week's workouts: 28 mins three times a
week as prescribed by the Harvard Medical Review.
Week one gently lays the foundations for effective
full body strength training that will melt belly fat.
And then.....this happens:
Days 1 and 2:
These days can be a bit rough.
We start the Challenge with a bang and the first two days
are all about coming off all the sugar and the caffeine
and the booze.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 18 --

We do restorative yoga, drink lots of herbal tea and chill.
Day 3:
Finally! After two days of feeling like hell, this is when
most people get a rush of energy and start to feel
awesome.
A lot of people decide they'll stay off the caffeine because
they don't feel like they need it.
Day 5:
First treat meal!
This is when you get to eat whatever you want for one
meal. Most Transformers choose to go out for something
special and toast to their success.
This is also the day when the Week 2 meal plan and
workouts are released.
Week 2:
We re-introduce dairy this week and some people find
that it doesn't sit well and they never realized it before
(As I mentioned in the webinar - new sensitivities are
really common for people in their 40s!).
The workouts are starting to ramp up and people are
posting silly #sweatyselfies when they are done.
There's tons of community support so even when you
aren't feeling it, there are tons of people who can relate
and encourage you to push through.
Day 15:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 18 --

Day 15:
Halfway mark fitness re-assessements. People are
amazed to report in the group how far they've come in
only two weeks
Week 3:
This week people are getting used to the fibre so we up
our smoothie game a bit by adding chia and increasing
the vegetable to fruit ratio.
We also add some puddings and the best sugar and
grain free pancakes you've ever tasted.
People begin to see how this could actually be
sustained for the long term.
Week 4:
We re-introduce certain grains this week and notice how
our bodies respond.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 18 --

The workouts are getting harder and even if you don't
think you'd ever be competitive, it's fun to smack talk in
the Facebook group.
It's a sprint to the finish and people are reporting
unbelievable results.
The Challenge ends with a bonus cookbook of healthy
desserts and lots of celebration!!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Hi (name)
As you know, registration for the 28 Day Transformation Challenge
closes at 11:59pm Eastern Time tonight.
Before we close the doors, I want to sincerely thank you. I know you've
got a lot going on and I don't take it for granted that you take the time to
read my emails.
THANK YOU for letting me pop into your inbox to share about how you
can change your body and life with The 28 Day Transformation
Challenge.
THANK YOU for your awesome questions, Instagram and Facebook
comments and your beautiful emails telling me about your situation.
THANK YOU for being brave and badass enough to want to make
changes in this area of your life where so many people are stuck.
But most importantly...
THANK YOU for letting me be a part of your dream of getting healthier -
at any age.
I know that it's easier to just go with the flow, to shrug your shoulders and
agree with everyone else 'it's just what happens at this age'.
The fact that you bothered to sign up for the webinar means you are not
that person.
And I want you to remember this: the world has never been
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

changed by people who are apathetic. It takes ZERO courage to be

And whether you join us for The 28 Day Transformation Challenge or not,

You matter. Your ideas matter. Your health and confidence matter. You

I’m in your corner and I believe in you.
I'm that coach who is handing you the water bottle and a pep talk before
you get back in the ring.
My hope is that there’s been something — an idea, one of my clients'
stories — that’s helped spark you into action.
I promise:
If you make a commitment to keep growing and getting better -
And you surround yourself with people who lift you up, there’s nothing
you can’t achieve!
I mean that shit. You can do this.

TONIGHT.
